narrative:
Westerville 5-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 889 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.8%, a modest Republican lean of 5.6 percentage points.
